argv: import json,sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));from core.repair_bay_handoff import build_repair_handoff,predict_engineer_route;from Departments.Engineering.mission_router import classify_mission;report={'read_only':True,'safety':{'network_used':False,'commands_run':False,'files_written':0,'repairs_applied':0},'findings':[{'id':'root_launcher_inventory','title':'FOXAI launcher map and protected baseline','severity':'recommended','summary':'Older launcher files deserve review.','suggested_action':'Prepare a reversible archive plan only.','evidence':[]}],'evidence':{'launcher_inventory':{'protected_baseline':{'root':[{'name':'PUSH_TO_GITHUB.bat'}]},'obsolete_looking_candidates':[{'name':'OLD_UNUSED_COPY.bat'}]}}};p=build_repair_handoff(root,report,'root_launcher_inventory',level='advanced');assert p.get('ok') is True,p;local=predict_engineer_route(p['engineer_command']);official=classify_mission(p['engineer_command']);assert local.get('route')=='plan' and local.get('implementation_authorized') is False,local;assert official.mission_type=='plan' and official.authorized is False,official;assert p.get('expected_workshop_route')=='plan',p;assert p.get('expected_implementation_authorized') is False,p;assert int(p.get('changes_applied') or 0)==0,p;assert p.get('mission_staged') is False,p;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V2_3_ROUTE_OK':True,'route':official.mission_type,'implementation_authorized':official.authorized,'command_chars':len(p['engineer_command'])},indent=2))
